message:
🐛 Skip onboarding wizard on Netlify preview and demo builds

When VITE_DEMO_MODE is true or the hostname indicates a Netlify deploy
preview, default demo users to onboarded=true so visitors go straight
to the dashboard without the 7-step questionnaire.

Local development still respects the localStorage toggle for testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
